revision.text:
<noinclude>__NOTOC__</noinclude> ===Wikipedia project pages=== * [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute]] * [[Wikipedia:Consensus]] * [[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution]] * [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute#Disputed statement|Wikipedia:Disputed statement]] * [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view]] * [[Wikipedia:Template index]] * [[Wikipedia:Template namespace]]
===Templates=== {{Main|Wikipedia:Template index/Disputes}}
====Disputed factual accuracy==== {{Category see also|Dispute templates}} * Boxes: ** {{tl|Disputed}} ''For disputing entire article'' ** {{tlp|Dispute about|what}} ''For disputing part of an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed section}} ''For disputing a section in an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed tag}} ''For disputing recent promotions or amendments of policies and guidelines'' ** {{tl|Under discussion}} ''For use on [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project]] pages (''e.g.'', policies and guidelines), not on articles''
* Inline: ** {{tl|Dubious}}, and {{tl|Disputed inline}} ''Statement'' **{{tl|Under discussion inline}} ''Statements on project pages''
====Both accuracy and POV==== * Boxes: ** {{tl|Controversial}} ''Talk page''
====Disputed [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|neutrality]] (POV)==== {{Category see also|Neutrality templates}} * Boxes: ** {{tl|POV}} ''Article'', {{tl|POV section}} ''Section'' ** {{tl|POV map}} ''Map''
* Inline: ** {{tl|Unbalanced opinion}} ''Statement'' ** {{tl|POV statement}} ''Statement''
====Wiki==== <!-- {{Empty section}} --> {{Citation and verifiability article maintenance templates|state=uncollapsed}} {{Inline cleanup tags}}
{{Tools|state=collapsed}}<noinclude> [[Category:All Wikipedia neutral point of view disputes|*]] [[Category:Dispute templates| ]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] [[Category:Neutrality templates| ]] [[Category:Wikipedia dispute resolution|*]] </noinclude>

revision.comment: Bot: add {{wikidata link|Q...}} or [[Category:Templates without wikidata]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>__NOTOC__</noinclude> ===Wikipedia project pages=== * [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute]] * [[Wikipedia:Consensus]] * [[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution]] * [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute#Disputed statement|Wikipedia:Disputed statement]] * [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view]] * [[Wikipedia:Template index]] * [[Wikipedia:Template namespace]]
===Templates=== {{Main|Wikipedia:Template index/Disputes}}
====Disputed factual accuracy==== {{Category see also|Dispute templates}} * Boxes: ** {{tl|Disputed}} ''For disputing entire article'' ** {{tlp|Dispute about|what}} ''For disputing part of an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed section}} ''For disputing a section in an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed tag}} ''For disputing recent promotions or amendments of policies and guidelines'' ** {{tl|Under discussion}} ''For use on [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project]] pages (''e.g.'', policies and guidelines), not on articles''
* Inline: ** {{tl|Dubious}}, and {{tl|Disputed inline}} ''Statement'' **{{tl|Under discussion inline}} ''Statements on project pages''
====Both accuracy and POV==== * Boxes: ** {{tl|Controversial}} ''Talk page''
====Disputed [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|neutrality]] (POV)==== {{Category see also|Neutrality templates}} * Boxes: ** {{tl|POV}} ''Article'', {{tl|POV section}} ''Section'' ** {{tl|POV map}} ''Map''
* Inline: ** {{tl|Unbalanced opinion}} ''Statement'' ** {{tl|POV statement}} ''Statement''
====Wiki==== <!-- {{Empty section}} --> {{Citation and verifiability article maintenance templates|state=uncollapsed}} {{Inline cleanup tags}}
{{Tools|state=collapsed}}<noinclude> [[Category:All Wikipedia neutral point of view disputes|*]] [[Category:Dispute templates| ]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] [[Category:Neutrality templates| ]] [[Category:Wikipedia dispute resolution|*]] </noinclude> <noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>

revision.comment: imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Text replacement - "↵<noinclude>[[Category:Templates without wikidata]]</noinclude>" to ""
revision.text:
<noinclude>__NOTOC__</noinclude> ===Wikipedia project pages=== * [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute]] * [[Wikipedia:Consensus]] * [[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution]] * [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute#Disputed statement|Wikipedia:Disputed statement]] * [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view]] * [[Wikipedia:Template index]] * [[Wikipedia:Template namespace]]
===Templates=== {{Main|Wikipedia:Template index/Disputes}}
====Disputed factual accuracy==== {{Category see also|Dispute templates}} * Boxes: ** {{tl|Disputed}} ''For disputing entire article'' ** {{tlp|Dispute about|what}} ''For disputing part of an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed section}} ''For disputing a section in an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed tag}} ''For disputing recent promotions or amendments of policies and guidelines'' ** {{tl|Under discussion}} ''For use on [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project]] pages (''e.g.'', policies and guidelines), not on articles''
* Inline: ** {{tl|Dubious}}, and {{tl|Disputed inline}} ''Statement'' **{{tl|Under discussion inline}} ''Statements on project pages''
====Both accuracy and POV==== * Boxes: ** {{tl|Controversial}} ''Talk page''

* Inline: ** {{tl|Unbalanced opinion}} ''Statement'' ** {{tl|POV statement}} ''Statement''

revision.comment: Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
revision.text:
<noinclude>__NOTOC__</noinclude> ===Wikipedia project pages=== * [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute]] * [[Wikipedia:Consensus]] * [[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution]] * [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute#Disputed statement|Wikipedia:Disputed statement]] * [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view]] * [[Wikipedia:Template index]] * [[Wikipedia:Template namespace]]
===Templates=== {{Main|Wikipedia:Template index/Disputes}}
====Disputed factual accuracy==== {{Category see also|Dispute templates}} * Boxes: ** {{tl|Disputed}} ''For disputing entire article'' ** {{tlp|Dispute about|what}} ''For disputing part of an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed section}} ''For disputing a section in an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed tag}} ''For disputing recent promotions or amendments of policies and guidelines'' ** {{tl|Under discussion}} ''For use on [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project]] pages (''e.g.'', policies and guidelines), not on articles''
* Inline: ** {{tl|Dubious}}, and {{tl|Disputed inline}} ''Statement'' **{{tl|Under discussion inline}} ''Statements on project pages''
====Both accuracy and POV==== * Boxes: ** {{tl|Controversial}} ''Talk page''

* Inline: ** {{tl|Unbalanced opinion}} ''Statement'' ** {{tl|POV statement}} ''Statement''

revision.comment: Bot: wrap 1 stray tag(s) in noinclude [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/23388260132|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<noinclude>__NOTOC__</noinclude> ===Wikipedia project pages=== * [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute]] * [[Wikipedia:Consensus]] * [[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution]] * [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute#Disputed statement|Wikipedia:Disputed statement]] * [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view]] * [[Wikipedia:Template index]] * [[Wikipedia:Template namespace]]
===Templates=== {{Main|Wikipedia:Template index/Disputes}}
====Disputed factual accuracy==== {{Category see also|Dispute templates}} * Boxes: ** {{tl|Disputed}} ''For disputing entire article'' ** {{tlp|Dispute about|what}} ''For disputing part of an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed section}} ''For disputing a section in an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed tag}} ''For disputing recent promotions or amendments of policies and guidelines'' ** {{tl|Under discussion}} ''For use on [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project]] pages (''e.g.'', policies and guidelines), not on articles''
* Inline: ** {{tl|Dubious}}, and {{tl|Disputed inline}} ''Statement'' **{{tl|Under discussion inline}} ''Statements on project pages''
====Both accuracy and POV==== * Boxes: ** {{tl|Controversial}} ''Talk page''

revision.comment: [[Project:History cleanup|Offloading history due to miraheze stability concerns]] many contributors, see [https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dispute_templates here] for full history [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]]
revision.text:
<!-- History offloaded: due to miraheze stability concerns, the edit history of this page has been offloaded to the XML archive. See https://emmaleonhart.github.io/shintowiki-scripts/wikihistory.html?page=Dispute_templates for full history. Last refreshed: [[github:EmmaLeonhart/shintowiki-scripts/actions/runs/24756154998|commit triggered pipeline]] --> <noinclude>__NOTOC__</noinclude> ===Wikipedia project pages=== * [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute]] * [[Wikipedia:Consensus]] * [[Wikipedia:Dispute resolution]] * [[Wikipedia:Accuracy dispute#Disputed statement|Wikipedia:Disputed statement]] * [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view]] * [[Wikipedia:Template index]] * [[Wikipedia:Template namespace]]
===Templates=== {{Main|Wikipedia:Template index/Disputes}}
====Disputed factual accuracy==== {{Category see also|Dispute templates}} * Boxes: ** {{tl|Disputed}} ''For disputing entire article'' ** {{tlp|Dispute about|what}} ''For disputing part of an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed section}} ''For disputing a section in an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed tag}} ''For disputing recent promotions or amendments of policies and guidelines'' ** {{tl|Under discussion}} ''For use on [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project]] pages (''e.g.'', policies and guidelines), not on articles''
* Inline: ** {{tl|Dubious}}, and {{tl|Disputed inline}} ''Statement'' **{{tl|Under discussion inline}} ''Statements on project pages''
====Both accuracy and POV==== * Boxes: ** {{tl|Controversial}} ''Talk page''
====Disputed [[Wikipedia:Neutral point of view|neutrality]] (POV)==== {{Category see also|Neutrality templates}} * Boxes: ** {{tl|POV}} ''Article'', {{tl|POV section}} ''Section'' ** {{tl|POV map}} ''Map''
* Inline: ** {{tl|Unbalanced opinion}} ''Statement'' ** {{tl|POV statement}} ''Statement''
====Wiki==== <!-- {{Empty section}} --> {{Citation and verifiability article maintenance templates|state=uncollapsed}} {{Inline cleanup tags}}
{{Tools|state=collapsed}}<noinclude> [[Category:All Wikipedia neutral point of view disputes|*]] [[Category:Dispute templates| ]] [[Category:Documentation see also templates]] [[Category:Neutrality templates| ]] [[Category:Wikipedia dispute resolution|*]]
[[Category:Templates]] [[Category:Templates fixed with noinclude]] </noinclude>

====Disputed factual accuracy==== {{Category see also|Dispute templates}} * Boxes: ** {{tl|Disputed}} ''For disputing entire article'' ** {{tlp|Dispute about|what}} ''For disputing part of an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed section}} ''For disputing a section in an article'' ** {{tl|Disputed tag}} ''For disputing recent promotions or amendments of policies and guidelines'' ** {{tl|Under discussion}} ''For use on [[Wikipedia:Project namespace|project]] pages (''e.g.'', policies and guidelines), not on articles''
* Inline: ** {{tl|Dubious}}, and {{tl|Disputed inline}} ''Statement'' **{{tl|Under discussion inline}} ''Statements on project pages''
